title: MachineUserConfig
description: Per-machine user-override JSON. Shadows the read-only default MachineConfig at load time; only fields the user has explicitly changed are present. See specs/007-ui-overhaul/data-model.md for merge semantics.

$cassoMachineVersion.description: Canonical schema version of the user file. Legacy `$cassoDefault` is accepted only during migration reads and is rewritten to `$cassoMachineVersion` on load.

$cassoUiPrefs.description: Machine-scoped UI preferences persisted from SettingsPanelState. Fields omitted here fall through to implicit defaults in code (authentic/color/buffer-and-flush/shugart/writeProtect=false).

internalDevices.description: Enable-state delta only. Entries identify component by `type` and override only `enabled`; other component fields fall through to default machine JSON.

slots.description: Enable-state delta only. Entries identify slot by `slot` and override only `enabled`; device/rom/capability metadata remain in default machine JSON.

lastMountedImages.description: Per-FR-047. Slot -> drive -> absolute image path. On machine load, each entry is auto-mounted; missing files are cleared on next SaveDelta.
